div.div:
Tier1 (L1)
・受付 / FAQ 引用 / 分類
・SLA: 15 分 (SEV1-2) / 1 h (SEV3-4)
・想定比率: 80%
・FAQ 引用率 70% 以上

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 450px; margin-left: 670px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Tier2 (L2)
・Runbook 実行 / 再現調査
・SLA: 30 分 (SEV1) / 1 h (SEV2) / 4 h (SEV3)
・想定比率: 15%
・Runbook 成功率 80% 以上

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 450px; margin-left: 970px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Tier3 (L3)
・根本原因特定 / 恒久対策実装
・SLA: 着手 8 h / 原因 24 h
・恒久対策: 1 週間以内
・想定比率: 5% 以下

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 230), rgb(30, 24, 9)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
